diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -138,14 +138,13 @@
         x3 = self.layer3(x2)  # [batch, 1024, H/16, W/16]

         x4 = self.layer4(x3)  # [batch, 2048, H/32, W/32]

         

-        # ASPP processing - FIXED: Pass x4 (2048 channels) instead of x3 (1024 channels)

-        aspp_out = self.aspp(x4)  # Now passing x4 which has 2048 channels as expected by ASPP

+        # ASPP path - FIXED: Now using x4 (2048 channels) instead of x3 (1024 channels)

+        aspp_out = self.aspp(x4)  # Pass x4 to ASPP instead of x3

         

-        # Decoder processing - use low-level features from layer1

-        low_level_features = x1  # Features from layer1 with 256 channels

-        output = self.decoder(aspp_out, low_level_features)

+        # Decoder path

+        decoder_out = self.decoder(aspp_out, x1)  # Use x1 as low-level features

         

         # Upsample to original input size

-        output = F.interpolate(output, size=x.shape[-2:], mode='bilinear', align_corners=False)

+        out = F.interpolate(decoder_out, size=x.shape[-2:], mode='bilinear', align_corners=False)

         

-        return output
+        return out
